query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalSearches,
  ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(response_time_ms), 0), 2) as avgResponseTime,
  COALESCE(MIN(response_time_ms), 0) as minResponseTime,
  COALESCE(MAX(response_time_ms), 0) as maxResponseTime
FROM search_analytics
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 720 HOUR);
command:

  COUNT(*) as totalSearches,
  ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(response_time_ms), 0), 2) as avgResponseTime,
  COALESCE(MIN(response_time_ms), 0) as minResponseTime,
  COALESCE(MAX(response_time_ms), 0) as maxResponseTime
FROM search_analytics
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 720 HOUR);
